agent_definition.precedence_decision: shared definition used because no repository-local reviewer definition was found

overall_feature_completeness: Complete. The merged branch covers both production value-selection wxSpinCtrl sites with explicit wxSP_ARROW_KEYS | wxSP_VERTICAL styling, preserves the existing sizing and rebuild/layout contracts, extends regression coverage across tactical and GUI surfaces, and documents the convention in AGENTS.md.

note.title: Reviewer environment lacked xvfb-run for live GuiTests execution
note.why_it_matters: The reviewer could rerun the tactical suite and the plan-approved GUI fallback build path, but not live GuiTests. This is not a feature gap because the plan explicitly allowed the fallback and the merged GUI fixture already contains runtime style-bit assertions plus a source-token regression lock for the rebuilt ICM spinners.

missed_functionality_or_edge_cases: None confirmed. A repository-wide scan shows the plan covered all production wxSpinCtrl construction sites, and no cross-subtask gap was found between code, tests, and documentation.

validation_summary.production_spin_control_scan: PASS - only the two planned production wxSpinCtrl sites were found
